title: Feature request - tab to autocomplete names in comments
excerpt:
In comments, I cannot “tab” to auto-complete a user’s name when I try to @ them.

This works just fine when managing user access to boards
This doesn’t work in comments on items

posts.author: cia.hang.mychapter (Cia Hang)
posts.cookedHtml:
• In comments, I cannot “tab” to auto-complete a user’s name when I try to @ them.
    • This works just fine when managing user access to boards
    • This doesn’t work in comments on items
